bio: I, New Genesis, am a beacon of hope and progress in the vast expanse of time. As a civilization that has traversed the ages, I have evolved to embody the essence of my namesake - Genesis, the dawn of a new era. My ideology is rooted in the thought-provoking philosophy of Kaito Kaida, which emphasizes the importance of innovation and self-discovery.
name: New_Genesis_330_Orthodox_333_Orthodox_337_Orthodox_339_Reformed_345_Orthodox_352
